prs.title: Add farmer dashboard UI
Add SQLite persistent memory module for LangGraph + memory test script
prs.body: I adds persistent memory support for the Farmer AI Agent using SQLite and LangGraph SqliteSaver. It enables long-term storage of agent state / conversation history and provides a simple test script to verify the memory module works correctly.

prs.title: squash latest commit
Korean fix and added transitions for add missing keys
prs.body:
**Description:**  
This PR updates the Korean localization file (`src/i18n/locales/ko.js`) to include missing translations for numerous keys such as `open_recent`, `no_saved_diagrams`, `snap_to_grid`, `show_datatype`, `share`, and many others that were previously defaulting to English or absent. By integrating these additional keys—drawn from the Malay localization as reference—this update ensures a more complete and consistent Korean user experience across the app.

**Highlights:**
- Adds all missing translation keys found in Malay but not in Korean
- Uses placeholder Korean text for newly added keys where original translated content is pending

prs.title: Safe UTF-8 Extraction and Robust <style> Block Detection in Upgrade Codemods
prs.body:
This PR improves the safety and robustness of Tailwind's candidate extraction and codemod migration logic in two critical areas:

1. **Rust UTF-8 Extraction**
   - Replaces `unsafe { String::from_utf8_unchecked(...) }` with safe `String::from_utf8(...)` in candidate extraction.
   - Skips any invalid UTF-8 candidates rather than panicking, providing a safer and more resilient extraction process.
2. **TypeScript Style Block Handling**
   - Switches from manual string-index logic to parsing using `node-html-parser` for detecting `<style>` blocks in codemod logic.
   - Ensures accurate detection of all `<style>` tags (including those with attributes and complex nesting), so migrations never accidentally affect style blocks.
   - Adds `node-html-parser` as a dependency to the `@tailwindcss-upgrade` package.
3. **pnpm Workspace Guidance**
   - Includes documentation for installing dependencies within the correct workspace package, avoiding root install issues.

These changes modernize the affected modules, prevent potential runtime errors from malformed files, and support robust migrations across real-world HTML/template structures.

---

## Test plan

**1. UTF-8 Candidate Extraction**
- Added test cases using invalid and valid UTF-8 byte candidates
- Ran `cargo test` to ensure the scanner skips bad candidates without panicking

**2. Codemod `<style>` Block Handling**
- Added migration examples with plain, nested, and attribute-rich `<style>` tags for multiple template syntaxes
- Confirmed classes inside `<style>` blocks are not migrated
- Ran:
  ```sh
  cd packages/@tailwindcss-upgrade
  pnpm install
  pnpm test

prs.title: Add Filipino (tl) translations and complete language support
prs.body:
This PR adds complete Filipino (Tagalog) language support to DrawDB.

It includes:
- the Filipino language object (`filipino`) for the language picker
- a full `tl.translation` map containing translations for:

**All menu items** (File, Edit, View, Settings, etc.)
**Diagram operations** (tables, relationships, notes, enums, types, subject areas, etc.)
**Error & validation messages**
**Timeline & task management strings**
**DBML view**, multiselect, bulk update, sharing
**All recent DrawDB features and UI components**

All keys are translated following the DrawDB i18n format and exactly match the key set of existing languages for maximum consistency.

Add Urdu (ur-PK) language support
prs.body:
# Add Urdu (ur-PK) Language Support

This PR adds full Urdu (ur-PK) language support to Excalidraw, including translations and RTL layout handling.

Changes

Added packages/excalidraw/locales/ur-PK.json with complete Urdu translations (UI labels, tooltips, dialogs, errors, menus).

Registered "ur-PK" in packages/excalidraw/i18n.ts with rtl: true.

Updated packages/excalidraw/locales/percentages.json to include "ur-PK" at 100% completion.

Testing

Verified Urdu appears in the language selector.

Switched UI to Urdu and confirmed:

Proper RTL rendering

Toolbar, dialogs, menus, and panels work as expected.

Translations load correctly across the interface.

**Screenshot**

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dbb06145-1b4f-4a89-9189-64cc2f4a32de)

Restrict /.well-known auth bypass to alive endpoint
prs.body:
**Description:**

- Restrict authentication bypass under `/.well-known` to only the alive endpoint.
- Previously, all `/.well-known/*` endpoints skipped auth via `isWellKnown`, which made `/.well-known/health` publicly accessible.
- This PR changes the auth middleware to bypass auth only for `service.AlivePath` (`/.well-known/alive`) and keeps `service.HealthPath` (`/.well-known/health`) protected.
- Updates [TestAuthMiddleware](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/khati/OneDrive/Desktop/gofr/pkg/gofr/http/middleware/auth_test.go:13:0-58:1) to:
  - Assert that `/.well-known/alive` is accessible without authentication.
  - Assert that `/.well-known/health` requires authentication (success and failure cases covered).

(Fixes the issue #2562.)

**Breaking Changes (if applicable):**

- None.
- This change only affects auth behavior for `/.well-known/health` by enforcing authentication where it was previously missing.

**Additional Information:**

-**Checklist:**

- [ ] I have formatted my code using `goimport` and `golangci-lint`.
- [x] All new code is covered by unit tests ([TestAuthMiddleware](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/khati/OneDrive/Desktop/gofr/pkg/gofr/http/middleware/auth_test.go:13:0-58:1) updated for the new behavior).
- [x] This PR does not decrease the overall code coverage.
- [ ] I have reviewed the code comments and documentation for clarity.

prs.title: solve the question pass all test case
prs.body:
Implemented session-based authentication in Express.js with three routes:
POST /login → validates credentials, creates session.
GET /profile → returns welcome message if logged in.
GET /logout → destroys session and clears cookie.
Tested with proper status codes (200, 401, 500).

prs.title: Fix the colour theme for the LinkUp.AI
prs.body:
i fix the colour theme for the LinkUp.ai #14  #F9FAFB (ghost white), #111827 (charcoal gray), and #EEF2FF (lavender mist).
these give the perfect balance. clean, modern, and very student-friendly.
#F9FAFB works really well as a soft background, #111827 is perfect for text or dark sections like the footer
 and #EEF2FF adds a little freshness — good for cards or highlighted sections without being too loud.
i feel this combo keeps the UI minimal and still gives that smart, premium feel.
Also fixed a small issue in the signup form changed the input type from number to tel for better mobile UX and formatting.
